description: Perform Sholl analysis on the Drosophila neuron image located at '~/Fiji_Data/raw/neuron/ddaC.tif' to quantify dendritic branching complexity. The analysis should use a starting radius of 10 pixels and a step size of 10 pixels, with the soma as the center. Export the resulting Intersection Counts table to '~/Fiji_Data/results/sholl/sholl_intersections.csv' and the Sholl Profile plot to '~/Fiji_Data/results/sholl/sholl_profile.png'. Additionally, generate a summary text file at '~/Fiji_Data/results/sholl/sholl_summary.txt' containing the following metrics in 'key=value' format (one per line): max_intersections, critical_radius, enclosing_radius, and total_intersections.
